query:
-- Remove the phantom assignment for S0412 (BI001356 doesn't exist, clean it up)
DELETE FROM service_billing_assignments WHERE serviceExternalId = 'S0412';

-- Assign ABB Internet (S0412) to BI00018 with retailBundleComponent = nbn
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (serviceExternalId, billingItemExternalId, matchScore, matchMethod, retailBundleComponent)
VALUES ('S0412', 'BI00018', 0.95, 'manual', 'nbn')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE billingItemExternalId = 'BI00018', retailBundleComponent = 'nbn';

-- Assign Vocus SIM (S6950) to BI00018 with retailBundleComponent = 4g_sim
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (serviceExternalId, billingItemExternalId, matchScore, matchMethod, retailBundleComponent)
VALUES ('S6950', 'BI00018', 0.90, 'manual', '4g_sim')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE billingItemExternalId = 'BI00018', retailBundleComponent = '4g_sim';

-- Tag the billing item as retail bundle
UPDATE billing_items SET retailBundleComponent = 'bundle' WHERE externalId = 'BI00018';

-- Verify the final state
SELECT sba.serviceExternalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.monthlyCost, sba.retailBundleComponent, sba.billingItemExternalId
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId
WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = 'BI00018';
